facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this one on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Their loss. The Waterfront Restaurant sits at 4.8 stars across 151 reviews and the crowd inside is not the resort crowd. Real food, real regulars, real Phu Quoc. Add this to your list before it gets discovered. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
